apihelp-edit-param-editorinterface: Magaca is-dhexgalka tifaftiraha ee la isticmaalay (sida MobileFrontend-SourceEditor)
apihelp-parse-param-mobileformat: Soo celi natiijada parsing-ka qaab ku habboon aaladaha mobilka.
apihelp-parse-param-noimages: Demi sawirrada ku jira natiijada mobilka.
apihelp-parse-param-mainpage: Codso isbeddellada bogga hore ee mobilka.
